warnBox.text:
If you delete your account, it will be permanently removed along with all your settings. However, uploaded entries, images, or announcements will be retained. If you also want to remove these, you must delete them manually before closing your account.

You can create a new account at any time, but previously added content will no longer be linked to your account, so you will no longer be able to access it.
warnBox.title: Delete Account permanently?

banner.text: We use cookies to reliably provide core functions such as login, security, and the operation of the schul-dashboard. Additionally, we use the privacy-friendly analytics tool Umami (cloud service) to understand how our site is used and to improve it further. Umami works without tracking cookies and does not store any personal data. You can find more information in our privacy policy.
banner.title: Cookies

global.title: schul-dashboard

home.joinGroupText: Join an existing group or create a new one to get started.
home.title: Home

1.content:
Trotz der Behauptung, dass sich die Christdemokraten um die Armen, Zugewanderten und Opfer scheren, beweisen sie immer wieder: Was uns ein Dorn im Auge ist, soll weg.

In New York wurde das Prinzip längst perfektioniert – Bänke mit Kurven, Abtrennungen und Stacheln sind der Trend des Jahres. Denn wenn man sich nicht hinlegen kann, geht man weg und „aus den Augen, aus dem Sinn“, oder? Leider ertönten keine feierlichen Trompeten, gefolgt von genug bezahlbaren Wohnungen und die Obdachlosen legten sich neben die Bänke. Aber die Berliner CDU glaubt, in Kreuzberg herrschen andere Gesetze. Wenn sie das ganze Geld, das für die Versorgung und Unterstützung der Suchtkranken eingeplant war, für einen riesigen Zaun um den Görlitzer Park ausgeben, dann müssten sie auf magische Weise verschwinden und keine zusätzlichen Investitionen wären nötig, so die These. Allerdings muss sich ein Denkfehler eingeschlichen haben – das einzige Problem, das verschwindet, ist die Entscheidung, wofür man 2 Mio. Euro Steuergelder ausgeben soll.

Ein befragter Anwohner findet, der Park brauche definitiv Hilfe, aber in Form von Hilfe für die Abhängigen – nur schlecht, dass das im Haushalt nicht vorgesehen ist. In den letzten Monaten gab es Aufschreie im Minutentakt, eine gesunde Prise zivilen Ungehorsam und zwei Klagen vom Bezirk, die schneller abgewiesen wurden, als man sie durchlesen kann. Aber was wissen die Menschen, um die es geht, schon über das Thema? Die christlichen „Demokraten“ hören auf das Volk – allerdings nur auf die reicheren 20 % in den Randbezirken. Der Zaun ist ein Geschenk an ihre Wähler, die den Park als Schande sehen, und kommt gleich mit einer Glückwunschkarte, auf der „Wir machen alles, was ihr wollt“ steht.

Solange Kai Wegner seine Symbolpolitik betreibt und jegliche Aufrufe der Bevölkerung ignoriert, scheint Geld für echte Lösungen fernzubleiben. Uns bleibt also nur noch eins zu hoffen – jeder freischaffende Pharmahändler denkt sich um 22 Uhr bei Schließung der Tore: Jetzt ist Feierabend.
1.excerpt: "No one has the intention of building a wall." That's what they said 60 years ago. Then a wall was built. Today it's a fence, and instead of the socialists, the CDU wants to build it.
1.title: No one has the intention of building a fence

infopop.text: Unlike regular entries, these are encrypted and only visible to you. This way you can also track personal tasks and to-dos – all within one app. Thanks to AES-256 encryption you don't need to worry about security: only your password can be used to access your private entries.
infopop.tooltip: Overview and features for private entries

private.requiresAccount: You must be logged in to use private entries.
private.title: Private Tasks

schedule.disclaimer: schul-dashboard and the admin team accept no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided.

infopop.description: The digital version of the schedule.

sections.title: Personalized courses
sections.text: If you've saved which courses/electives you're enrolled in on your account, you can automatically hide all lessons that don't apply to you. You can adjust your selection in your account settings. If you still want to see all lessons, you can also disable this option in your account settings.

sections.title: Live updates
sections.text: Substitutions, cancellations, room changes, etc. are promptly transferred by the admin team and immediately shown in the digital schedule.

infopop.tooltip: Overview and features for the schedule

schedule.title: Schedule

archive.archiveNote: You are currently viewing old entries

infopop.description: Work collaboratively with others and keep track of everything.

sections.title: Entries
sections.text: Anyone with an account can add an entry. Whether it's a homework assignment, Dalton task, or exam – anything you need to keep track of for school can be uploaded. All entries are public and visible at any time, so you can track together with others.

sections.title: Adding entries
sections.text: To add an entry, click the + and select the type. Homework, Dalton tasks, and exams are always public; private entries are encrypted and only visible to you. Fill out the form and select the subject and due date. Optionally, related images can be uploaded such as board photos, model solutions, notes, study sheets, etc.

sections.title: Uploading images
sections.text: Images can also be uploaded to other people's entries if relevant; click the 3-dot menu, select Upload images and choose the desired images. To remove your own images, hold the image pressed or right-click on your image and select Delete from the menu.

sections.title: Reporting misinformation
sections.text: Entries should generally be accurate, but if you discover incorrect information in someone else's entry, you can click "Report" in the 3-dot menu and submit a correction under "Misinformation". Your message will then be reviewed and attached as a note to the reported entry.

sections.title: Tracking completed tasks
sections.text: If you have an account, you can check off any entry you've completed using the checkbox. Your progress is saved in the cloud and the entry is minimized to make room for open tasks. This way you can immediately see what you still need to do.

sections.title: Personalized courses
sections.text: If you've saved which courses/electives you're enrolled in on your account, you can automatically hide entries for other subjects. You can adjust your selection in your account settings. If you still want to see all entries, you can also disable this option in your account settings.

sections.title: Archive
sections.text: Entries older than 24 hours are automatically hidden to keep the view tidy. If you're looking for an older entry, you can click the Archive button and view entries up to 30 days old.

errors.customLong: The custom subject is too long (max. 100 characters)
errors.dateNew: The due date is too far in the future
errors.dateOld: The due date is too far in the past
errors.descriptionLong: The description is too long (max. 1000 characters)
errors.titleLong: The title is too long (max. 60 characters)

delete.description: If you delete this entry, it and all associated images will be permanently deleted.
delete.title: Delete this entry?

sections.title: Misinformation
sections.text: The information mentioned in the entry or the uploaded images contain false or misleading content? Such entries can have notes with corrections attached, but you must describe what is wrong and/or what the correct information is. Please try to be as brief and clear as possible. Your message will be reviewed and attached to the reported entry once approved.

sections.title: Inappropriate/Illegal Content
sections.text: Entries and uploaded images that violate our terms of use or applicable law will be removed immediately. If more detailed knowledge about the background of a statement/image is needed, please describe it as precisely as possible so we can take action. Even if the violation is obvious, you can still help us by describing what is wrong – but we always review the entire entry, even if you don't provide a specific reason.
